verdict: Complete and seeded — all 6 templates present with meaningful seeds, MEMORY empty, scripts correct, First Breath comprehensive. Two issues: substitution mismatch in CREED DOMINION paths, and builder .memlog.md leaks into sanctum.

findings.title: {project-root} placeholder substitution mismatch in CREED-template.md DOMINION section
findings.evidence: CREED-template.md uses `{project-root}` (hyphen, 7 occurrences) but init-sanctum.py provides only `project_root` (underscore) in its variables dict. After scaffolding, the rendered CREED.md will contain literal `{project-root}` strings instead of actual paths. Meanwhile `{sanctum_path}` on line 72 uses underscore and substitutes correctly — the mismatch is partial.
findings.recommendation: Either change template to use `{project_root}` (underscore) to match the variable, or add a second entry `"project-root": str(project_root)` to the variables dict in init-sanctum.py.

findings.title: .memlog.md (builder artifact) leaks into sanctum runtime memory
findings.evidence: `.memlog.md` lives inside references/ and will be copied into the sanctum by `copy_references()`. SKILL_ONLY_FILES does not filter dotfiles, and `pathlib.Path.iterdir()` does enumerate them. This seeds the agent's runtime memory with builder trace data.
findings.recommendation: Add ".memlog.md" to SKILL_ONLY_FILES, or add a glob filter in copy_references to skip dotfiles.
